ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IceWhaleTech/CasaOS
Language: go
CasaOS - A simple, easy-to-use, elegant open-source Personal Cloud system.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: argoproj/argo-cd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd
Language: go
Declarative Continuous Deployment for Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: charmbracelet/crush
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/charmbracelet/crush
Language: go
Glamourous agentic coding for all 💘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cli/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cli/cli
Language: go
GitHub’s official command line tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ethereum/go-ethereum
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum
Language: go
Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/gastown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/gastown
Language: go
Gas Town - multi-agent workspace manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: karust/openserp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/karust/openserp
Language: go
Self-hosted SERP API for AI, SEO & automation. Browser-rendered Google, Bing, Yandex, Baidu, DuckDuckGo and Ecosia search with page extraction 🎉

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kenn-io/agentsview
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kenn-io/agentsview
Language: go
Local-first session search, analytics, insights, and token use statistics for coding agents, supporting Claude Code, Codex, and more than 20 other agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: larksuite/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/larksuite/cli
Language: go
The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netbirdio/netbird
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird
Language: go
Connect your devices into a secure WireGuard®-based overlay network with SSO, MFA and granular access controls.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: go
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib
Language: go
Contrib repository for the OpenTelemetry Collector

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei
Language: go
Nuclei is a fast, customizable vulnerability scanner powered by the global security community and built on a simple YAML-based DSL, enabling collaboration to tackle trending vulnerabilities on the internet. It helps you find vulnerabilities in your applications, APIs, networks, DNS, and cloud configurations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prometheus/node_exporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter
Language: go
Exporter for machine metrics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prometheus/prometheus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus
Language: go
The Prometheus monitoring system and time series database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rancher/rancher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rancher/rancher
Language: go
Complete container management platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailscale/tailscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tailscale/tailscale
Language: go
The easiest, most secure way to use WireGuard and 2FA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: temporalio/temporal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/temporalio/temporal
Language: go
Temporal service

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vxcontrol/pentagi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi
Language: go
Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: weaviate/weaviate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/weaviate/weaviate
Language: go
Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for the combination of vector search with structured filtering with the fault tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database​.
